entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A cereal grain, Pennisetum glaucum, studied for diversity and adaptation.

entities.name: WEST AND CENTRAL AFRICA
entities.description: Geographical region from which pearl millet samples were collected.

entities.name: WCA
entities.description: Abbreviation for West and Central Africa.

entities.name: CLIMATIC CONDITIONS
entities.description: Range of climate types present in West and Central Africa.

entities.name: ENVIRONMENTAL CONDITIONS
entities.description: Range of environmental factors present in West and Central Africa.

entities.name: FARMER PREFERENCES
entities.description: The diverse preferences of farmers regarding pearl millet.

entities.name: PEARL MILLET UTILIZATION
entities.description: The different ways pearl millet is used by farmers.

entities.name: LOCAL ADAPTATION
entities.description: The process of pearl millet adapting to specific local conditions.

entities.name: POPULATION STRUCTURE
entities.description: The genetic organization of pearl millet populations.

entities.name: GENETIC DIVERSITY
entities.description: The range of genetic variation within pearl millet.

entities.name: INBREDS
entities.description: Pearl millet lines derived from landraces, used for genetic analysis.

entities.name: LANDRACES
entities.description: Locally adapted varieties of pearl millet.

entities.name: FLOWERING TIME
entities.description: A phenotypic trait of pearl millet, related to population structure.

entities.name: RELATIVE RESPONSE TO PHOTOPERIOD
entities.description: A phenotypic trait of pearl millet, related to population structure.

entities.name: PANICLE LENGTH
entities.description: A phenotypic trait of pearl millet, related to population structure.

entities.name: LATITUDE
entities.description: A geographical parameter, expected to influence traits but not significantly associated with population structure.

entities.name: TEMPERATURE
entities.description: An environmental factor, expected to influence traits but not significantly associated with population structure.

entities.name: PRECIPITATION
entities.description: An environmental factor, expected to influence traits but not significantly associated with population structure.

entities.name: STRUCTURE
entities.description: A software used to detect sub-groups within the germplasm set.

entities.name: NATURAL SELECTION
entities.description: The process of evolution driven by environmental factors.

entities.name: ARTIFICIAL SELECTION
entities.description: The process of evolution driven by human intervention.
